text:
Market today: AI is still the undisputed king, pushing demand for energy resources. This is the undercurrent for tech names.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL candidate (-37.71%) given its leveraged decay and current status. SPAL is also a TRIM candidate (-48.51%), another leveraged ETF in the red.

Watch: Keep an eye on NVDA and AMD setups from the scanner. They are showing strength in the chip space.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and watching for strength in your core tech names.
plays: SOXL: TRIM/SELL - given the -37.71% PNL and leveraged decay, consider reducing exposure.
SPAL: TRIM - this leveraged ETF is down significantly (-48.51%), consider trimming to manage risk.
NVDA: WATCH - scanner shows a LONG setup (entry 206.47-206.24, stop 205.57) if it pulls back to discount.
